title: National Training on Carbon Sequestration and Carbon Trading 6–17 February 2012
abstract:
A two-week national training course on Carbon Sequestration and Carbon Trading
supported by National Agricultural Innovation Project (NAIP) and Indian Council for
Agricultural Research (ICAR) was held at ICRISAT-Patancheru from 6 to 17 February, 2012.
Sixteen participants representing ICAR institutions, State Agricultural Universities (SAUs),
and ICRISAT participated in this course which was jointly offered by the ICRISAT, India
and University of Florida, USA (Figure 1). The training was comprised of theory and handson
experiences by renowned faculty trainers from ICRISAT, the University of Florida,
Virginia Tech University and the National Bureau of Soil Survey and Land Use Planning
(NBSS&LUP), Nagpur. The course......
